properties.name: Inflatable World Cookstown
properties.description: A massive indoor arena filled with giant inflatables, slides, and bouncy obstacles. An ideal high-energy spot for kids to burn off steam regardless of the weather.

properties.name: Wee Adventurers Play Hub
properties.description: A modern and clean indoor play space in Cookstown. Tailored specifically for younger children and toddlers with imaginative play zones and safe climbing areas.

properties.name: Happy Dayz
properties.description: A popular multi-level soft play centre in Ballygawley. Features large slides, ball pits, and a dedicated cafe area for parents.

properties.name: Duff Land
properties.description: Located in Pomeroy, this 'indoor theme park' offers a unique mix of soft play and inflatable fun, making it a favorite for birthday parties and family day trips.
